tips_en: Start with the Xiaomi-Robotics-U0 paper (Paper 1) as it provides the broadest foundation—unifying generative modeling with embodied AI—and its impressive 38B-parameter results establish a strong baseline context. Then read SpectraReward (Paper 3), as its training-free, log-likelihood-based reward signal could be readily plugged into U0's RL/alignment pipeline to improve compositional generation without extra annotations. Finally, ABot-AgentOS (Paper 2) complements both by tackling the downstream reasoning and long-horizon execution side, showing how a generation-capable backbone like U0 could be wrapped in a typed multi-modal memory and self-evolving agent harness for real-world deployment.
tips_zh: 建议首先阅读 Xiaomi-Robotics-U0（论文1），因为它覆盖面最广，将生成式建模与具身智能统一起来，且其 38B 参数的出色结果奠定了坚实的研究背景。接着读 SpectraReward（论文3），其免训练、基于对数似然的奖励信号可直接嵌入 U0 的 RL/对齐流程，无需额外标注即可提升组合生成质量。最后阅读 ABot-AgentOS（论文2），它从下游推理与长时程执行的角度对前两篇形成补充，展示了如何将具备生成能力的主干（如 U0）封装在类型化多模态记忆与自进化智能体框架中，从而实现真实场景部署。
